prediction.reasoning: Based on AON's historical volatility as a large-cap insurance services stock, I estimated an annualized volatility of approximately 25%. For a 20-day period, this translates to roughly 5.7% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward drift typical of established financial services companies. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the geometric Brownian motion model, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 20-day horizon.
